errors.description: Recipient is on the suppression list. Delivery marked permanently_failed with this code; not an error to callers.
Provider webhook reported a hard bounce. Delivery marked permanently_failed + address added to suppression list.
Transient delivery failure. Delivery marked failed + retry scheduled.
Recipient marked as spam. Address added to suppression + retained P5Y for CAN-SPAM evidence.
Provider returned a 5xx response OR the transport threw an exception. Retryable via RetryDeliveryJob backoff.
Provider disabled via kill switch. Delivery holds until an alternate provider is available.
Provider rate limit hit. Retry with backoff; consider load-shedding via feature flag.
Blade rendering of body_rendered_html threw. Indicates a bug in the template or payload.
Provider webhook failed signature verification. Rejected before controller. Logged with the invalid signature fragment for support.
Provider webhook referenced a provider_message_id we don't have. Late-arriving webhook for a purged notification is not an error — we ack + drop.
Configured from_email not verified on the selected provider. Fix in tenant settings or provider dashboard.
Tenant has no postal_address configured but is trying to send marketing-priority mail. Refused when notifications.mail.strict_can_spam_footer flag is on.
